researched: Three YouTube source URLs are attached when the video workflow is used
A matching research/youtube JSON record exists
Source notes are stored outside reader-facing prose
reviewed: The opening describes a concrete reader situation
The article has at least two H2 sections
The article contains a decision asset such as a table, checklist, or recommendation block
The prose does not mention the internal video research process
monetized: High-intent articles have at least one affiliate product mapping
Approved ad creatives include imageUrl, imageAlt, and clickUrl
Ad creative placement matches the reader's decision context
verified: AdSense, ads.txt, and affiliate redirects are checked
improving: Search Console, analytics, affiliate clicks, and manual review notes are used to create the next action queue
